- [Controller WebSocket link](./controller-websocket-link.md) — `capability` — The runtime's single northbound WS to the controller: registration → readiness sequencing, infinite-backoff reconnect, sole-writer metadata injection, drop-on-saturation backpressure

- [Git credential mint pipeline](./git-credential-mint-pipeline.md) — `capability` — How in-pod git obtains short-lived tokens: helper binary → UDS → WS mint request, correlated response, nothing persisted
